title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 49.460 - Order of payment, when made
text:
49.460.  Order of payment, when made. — No such order shall be made unless the superintendent shall certify to the county commission that the due proportion of the work has been completed and executed according to contract.
(RSMo 1939 § 13728, A.L. 1983 S.B. 219) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12069; 1919 § 9469; 1909 § 3690 
Effective 1-01-85
